name: Outreach
description: Drive Outreach (sales engagement platform) from any AI agent: prospects, accounts, sequences, sequence enrollment, tasks, users. 11 tools, OAuth2 Bearer auth, JSON:API spec.
instructions:
This connector uses the Outreach API v2 (developers.outreach.io).

**Setup**:
1. Outreach API access is OAuth2-only — no static API keys. Register an OAuth app at https://developers.outreach.io.
2. Run the OAuth2 authorization-code flow to obtain an access_token (short-lived, ~7200 s) + refresh_token (long-lived). The access_token is what you pass to the connector.
3. Set `OUTREACH_ACCESS_TOKEN`.
4. Refresh logic: handle refresh-token rotation externally (the engine refreshes BEARER_TOKEN on 401 if `refreshToken` + `tokenUrl` are present in authConfig — but per-tenant OAuth2 setup is outside this connector's scope).

**Authentication**: `Authorization: Bearer ${OUTREACH_ACCESS_TOKEN}`.

**JSON:API spec**: every response wraps data in `{data:{id,type,attributes,relationships}, included?:[], meta, links}`. Use `?include=` (comma-separated) to side-load related resources. Use `?fields[TYPE]=...` for sparse fieldsets.

**Outreach objects** (Outreach-specific naming):
  - **Prospect** = a person at an account (like Salesloft 'person').
  - **Account** = a company.
  - **Sequence** = multi-step outreach cadence.
  - **Sequence Step** = each touchpoint.
  - **Sequence State** = a prospect's enrollment in a sequence (active/paused/finished/bounced).
  - **Mailbox** = the email account used to send sequence emails.

**Sequence enrollment**: POST `/sequenceStates` with relationships {prospect, sequence, mailbox}. The mailbox must belong to the API token's user OR a delegated user.

**Filtering**: `filter[attribute]=value` query syntax. Multiple filters AND together. Example: `?filter[bounced]=true&filter[sequenceState.id]=N`.

**Pagination**: `page[size]` (default 50, max 1000) + `page[after]` cursor.

**Rate limits**: 10,000 req/hour per token (Enterprise). On 429 honor `Retry-After`.

**Out of scope here**: sequence template editing, calling, conversational intelligence, opportunity sync (use the CRM directly), task templates.

tools.name: outreach_list_prospects
tools.description: List prospects with filters. Supports filter[emails], filter[accountId], filter[ownerId], filter[stage.id], filter[engagedAt][gte], etc.

tools.name: outreach_get_prospect
tools.description: Fetch a prospect by ID with full attributes and relationships.

tools.name: outreach_create_prospect
tools.description: Create a prospect. JSON:API envelope: {data: {type:'prospect', attributes:{emails:['a@b.com'], firstName, lastName, ...}, relationships:{account:{data:{type:'account',id:'N'}}, owner:{data:{type:'user',id:'M'}}}}}.

data.description: JSON:API data envelope. {type:'prospect', attributes:{emails:['email1','email2'], firstName?, lastName?, title?, addressCity?, ...}, relationships?:{account, owner}}. Wrap inside {data:{...}}.

tools.name: outreach_update_prospect
tools.description: Update a prospect. JSON:API PATCH envelope: {data: {type:'prospect', id:PROSPECT_ID, attributes:{...}}}.

tools.name: outreach_list_accounts
tools.description: List accounts with filters. Each account has name, domain, industry, numberOfEmployees, websiteUrl, addressCity, custom*.

tools.name: outreach_list_sequences
tools.description: List sequences (cadences). Each has name, shareType (private/shared), enabled, numActiveProspects, numSteps.

tools.name: outreach_enroll_in_sequence
tools.description: Enroll a prospect in a sequence (create sequenceState). The mailbox must belong to a user with permission to send through it. JSON:API envelope.

tools.name: outreach_list_mailboxes
tools.description: List mailboxes (email accounts connected to Outreach for sending). Returns id, email, sendType (sequenceSend / replyFromSequence), userId.

tools.name: outreach_list_users
tools.description: List Outreach users. Returns id, name, email, role, locked, createdAt.

tools.name: outreach_list_tasks
tools.description: List tasks (manual steps in sequences that need agent action — calls, custom emails, LinkedIn DMs). Filter by state (pending/skipped/completed) and assignee.

tools.name: outreach_list_stages
tools.description: List prospect stages defined on the org (the funnel positions like Lead/MQL/SQL/Opportunity). Required to compose filter[stage.id] queries.
